overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark forested mountain path at night. The character approaches a burning campfire and navigates around it while snow-capped mountains loom in the background under an overcast sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding forest path toward a distant campfire

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the trees in the distance
dense pine trees lining the left side of the trail
dense pine trees lining the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the forest
active campfire with orange flames glowing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense coniferous forest at night. Snow-capped mountains are visible in the distance ahead, while the glow of a burning campfire grows brighter on the left side of the path.

events.description: character turns left to navigate around the campfire and wooden barrier

agents.ego_description: turning left to circle around the campfire and continuing deeper into the forest

entered.detail: rough wooden barrier structure surrounding the campfire area
ancient stone wall ruins visible beyond the campfire

segments.scene_description: Turning left to navigate around the burning campfire and wooden fence structure. The character passes the light source and continues along the trail as the snow-capped mountains disappear from view behind the dense forest canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark mountain trail that shifts from an open view of distant peaks to the claustrophobic enclosure of a dense forest. It begins by tracking along a narrow dirt path through coniferous trees, where the glow of a burning campfire steadily intensifies on the left against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains. As the camera reaches the light source, it turns left to navigate around the campfire and a weathered wooden fence structure. The scene then shifts away from the warmth of the fire and continues forward along the trail, causing the distant mountains to gradually vanish behind the thickening forest canopy.
